texto: It just seems to be a human trait to want to protect the speech of people with whom we agree. For the First Amendment, that is not good enough. So it is really important that we protect First Amendment rights of people no matter what side of the line they are on.
explicacao: Citação de Floyd Abrams sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “It just seems to be a human trait to want to protect the speech of people with whom we agree. For…” articula reflexao, people, not-good-enough em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e not-good-enough.

frase_original: It just seems to be a human trait to want to protect the speech of people with whom we agree. For the First Amendment, that is not good enough. So it is really important that we protect First Amendment rights of people no matter what side of the line they are on.

texto: So sometimes the facts are good and sometimes the facts are bad, the important thing from the point of view of a principle as broad and important as freedom of speech is that the courts articulate and set forth in a very protective way what those principles are.
